cases.exclusion_target: No solution with dF>0 and second-order maximum condition on tangent ker dF∩1^perp.

cases.KKT_equation: H_F(theta) v = lambda gradF(theta) + nu v, nu>=0
cases.exclusion_target: No active-boundary contact point with positive pair derivative.
cases.multiplier_formula: nu = v^T H_F v/||v||^2 - lambda dF/||v||^2

cases.exclusion_target: Allowed equality point; not an obstruction.

claim: Formalizes the exact KKT obstruction system that any multilevel counterexample to the weighted-asymmetry contact lemma must satisfy.
claim_boundary: This is not a proof of the final theorem. It is the exact multilevel KKT system left to exclude.

proof_spine.statement: The global shell inequality is equivalent to F_w(theta)<=0 for all theta.
Barrier Schur compression would prove the shell inequality.
For pair v=e0-e1, the remaining multilevel contact lemma is dF=v·gradF<=0 on F=0, v·theta>=0.
If the lemma fails, compactness after centering gives a maximizer of dF on the contact set.

proof_spine.formula: H_F v = lambda gradF + nu v, with nu>=0 and nu(v·theta)=0.
proof_spine.statement: At such a maximizer, KKT gives an exact finite analytic obstruction system.
The analytic-gradient audit found no valid positive solution and collapsed to equal, but exact proof still requires excluding this KKT system symbolically.

theorem.KKT_obstruction: If the contact lemma fails, then there exists theta, lambda, nu with F=0, sum theta=0, v·theta>=0, dF>0, nu>=0, nu(v·theta)=0, and H v=lambda g+nu v.
theorem.boundary_reduction: If v·theta=0, then H v=lambda g+nu v with nu>=0.
theorem.interior_reduction: If v·theta>0, then nu=0 and H v=lambda g.
theorem.name: Multilevel KKT obstruction system for the weighted-asymmetry contact lemma
theorem.remaining_exact_certificate: Prove the KKT obstruction system has no solution with dF>0 for w=12,16, e.g. by a Terwilliger block-SOS or exact interval/Krawtchouk certificate.
theorem.why_this_generalizes_pair_stabilized: The pair-stabilized proof closes the fixed-rest symmetric slice. This KKT system is for arbitrary multilevel theta and does not assume the other 22 coordinates are equal.
